description: This file defines the REST controller 'RcaController' for handling HTTP requests related to Root Cause Analysis (RCA) per defect. It provides endpoints to get, upsert, and delete RCA records associated with specific defects, utilizing Spring Boot annotations and dependencies.

classes.name: RcaController
classes.description: REST controller for managing RCA records associated with defects, enabling retrieval, creation/updating, and deletion via HTTP endpoints.

methods.name: getByDefect
methods.description: Handles GET requests to retrieve RCA information for a specified defect ID; throws 404 if not found.

methods.name: upsert
methods.description: Handles PUT requests to create or update RCA details for a defect, ensuring path and body defect IDs match.

methods.name: deleteByDefect
methods.description: Handles DELETE requests to remove the RCA record linked to a specific defect ID.
